title: melicope molokaiensis
intro: Melicope molokaiensis, also known as the Molokai nettle tree or Molokai hau, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. This plant is often used in traditional Hawaiian medicine, known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Melicope molokaiensis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antifungal properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a topical cream or infusion, and its essential oil can also be extracted for use in herbal remedies and aromatherapy.
